## Maintainer publish checklist

- [ ] APKG file is stored as a GitHub Release asset, not committed to Git.
- [ ] `decks/<category>/<slug>/deck.json` was added or updated.
- [ ] SHA256 digest and file size match the release asset.
- [ ] Split segments are listed when users may want only part of the deck.
- [ ] `npm run catalog:build` was run.
- [ ] `npm run catalog:check` passes.
- [ ] This change is maintainer-authored or maintainer-approved.
